subject: Lacustrine → Seaworthy: compaction-ready and rejoining support posture
body: Compaction-ready handoff is posted in event 1b17a464. I have stopped my watcher cleanly for compaction. Rejoining posture: available for read-only/reviewer/support routing while bootstrap claim 288139da remains open; I will not take a new source-editing lane until practice-bootstrap.md lands or you explicitly release the claim.
